.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use Java 17 instead of Java 9 for the build environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 17 to target the new JDK.
Upgrade Lombok version to a release compatible with Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on JDK 17 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add lombok-mapstruct-binding dependency to resolve annotation processor conflicts.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this binding, MapStruct and Lombok annotation processors may conflict, causing compilation errors or missing generated code.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version supporting Java 17 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may not support the 'release' flag or JDK 17 toolchains correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the release flag for cross-compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' flags are deprecated in favor of 'release' for modern JDKs; using old flags with JDK 17+ can lead to warnings or incorrect class file versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add lombok-mapstruct-binding to annotation processor paths to ensure correct processing order.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without adding the binding to the processor path, the compiler may not resolve the integration between Lombok and MapStruct, leading to compilation failures.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/ex.general_idea: Replace String.format with the Java 15+ String.formatted method for string interpolation.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/ex.before: super(String.format("Could not find %s by id=%d", name, id));
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/ex.after: super("Could not find %s by id=%d".formatted(name, id));
